title: CC narrative review S08 panel a1

payload.notes: narrative_beat_fidelity 5/5: S08 delivers its B06 mid-beat exactly — euphoria spike (executor on the desk, "0.71！起飞了！") against the audit arc's provisional-evidence counterweight (reviewer's "整批跑完再说。"). Both intended roles land as scripted: the blue executor has leapt ONTO the desk, both hands pointing at the 0.71 tick (bounce high/proud, still visibly below his hand-off MAX, so the bounce ladder holds), while the green reviewer ignores the headline curve entirely and leans over the step-log side screen (step 4200..., one eyebrow raised) — exuberance vs vigilance, the precise S07 launch → S08 curve-lift slice with no payoff leak into S09's silent bottom panel. The wandb · exact_parse chart card is the room's centerpiece as scripted: gray flat random-mask baseline ending 0.60 vs the rising green schema-first line with its 0.60 → 0.71 pill and 0.71 endpoint chip, amber DDL T-17:46 keeping the clock pressure alive; both expected_literals (0.60, 0.71) are baked and legible, and the caption ('凌晨的曲线从 0.60 爬到 0.71。') reads off the figure in one glance. The 'full batch □' sticky note plants the provisional-evidence counterweight visually without pulling the later batch-verdict beat forward. COMPOSITION (STORY) 4.5/5: reading order executor-shout → 0.71 tick → 0.60 → 0.71 pill → reviewer → step-log screen lands the beat in one read; the half-step deduction is that the bright green step-log side screen briefly competes with the central 0.60 → 0.71 anchor on first read — structural, not beat-level. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story (no beat-level rejection). Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / safezone / baked-text quality are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini + Codex).
